summary.key_theme: 亞馬遜透過收購 Fauna Robotics 進軍人形機器人市場，並受惠於 AWS 在 AI 領域的強勁需求，推動分析師調升目標價。

bullish.title: Amazon Gains on Stronger AWS Outlook From AI Demand
bullish.reason: 分析師因 AI 需求帶動雲端業務成長，上調亞馬遜營收預測，直接強化市場對其核心獲利引擎的信心。

bullish.title: As Demand for AWS’ AI Surges, Citi and JPMorgan Raise Amazon Price Targets
bullish.reason: 花旗與摩根大通兩大投行調升目標價，反映華爾街對亞馬遜在 AI 雲端運算領域競爭優勢的認可。

bullish.title: Amazon acquires 'approachable' humanoid maker Fauna Robotics
bullish.reason: 收購 Fauna Robotics 標誌亞馬遜正式進軍人形機器人市場，展現其在自動化與消費級機器人領域的長期戰略佈局。

bullish.title: Amazon's Zoox to debut robotaxis in Austin, Miami later this year
bullish.reason: 自動駕駛子公司 Zoox 擴大在奧斯汀與邁阿密的營運範圍，顯示其無人計程車業務正穩步邁向商業化。

bullish.title: The Best Stocks to Invest $50,000 in Right Now
bullish.reason: 被市場分析師列為長期投資首選，增強投資人對亞馬遜長期成長潛力的信心。

bullish.title: Shirofune Integrates with Amazon DSP to Offer Flexible Programmatic Advertising
bullish.reason: 與 Shirofune 的整合強化了亞馬遜廣告平台 (DSP) 的自動化能力，有助於提升廣告業務營收。

bullish.title: Update: Market Chatter: Amazon Web Services Ramps Up AI Agents After Layoffs
bullish.reason: 儘管經歷裁員，AWS 積極投入 AI Agent 開發，顯示公司正透過組織優化將資源集中於高成長的 AI 領域。

bullish.title: Amazon Is Entering the Humanoid Robot Market. 3 Important Things to Know About the Fauna Robotics Acquisition.
bullish.reason: 進一步分析收購 Fauna Robotics 的戰略意義，確認亞馬遜在機器人領域的長期野心。

bearish.title: Illinois Supreme Court ruling against Amazon could be expensive
bearish.reason: 伊利諾州最高法院的裁決可能導致亞馬遜面臨額外的法律賠償成本，對財務造成潛在負面影響。

bearish.title: Amazon faces further AWS disruption in the Middle East from Iran conflict
bearish.reason: 地緣政治衝突導致 AWS 在中東地區服務中斷，影響雲端服務的穩定性與客戶信任度。

bearish.title: Prime Video Price Increases Are on the Way as Amazon Rebrands Ad-Free Subscription
bearish.reason: 透過變相漲價推動無廣告訂閱，可能引發部分用戶不滿，增加訂閱流失風險。

neutral.title: Top Stock Reports for Amazon.com, TJX and Eaton Corp.
neutral.reason: 僅為例行性的研究報告發布，未包含具體影響股價的重大新資訊。

neutral.title: Amazon Stock: Time to Bail or Time to Buy?
neutral.reason: 探討投資策略的分析文章，觀點中立，未對股價產生直接驅動。

neutral.title: Amazon Is Buying Its Way Into Robots — Tesla Is Building Them From Scratch
neutral.reason: 將亞馬遜與特斯拉的機器人策略進行對比，屬於產業分析性質，無明確利多或利空。

neutral.title: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
neutral.reason: 描述物流產業競爭加劇，亞馬遜雖面臨挑戰但已具備領先優勢，影響有限。

neutral.title: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer
neutral.reason: Arm 推出自研晶片，雖提及亞馬遜為客戶，但重點在於 Meta 的採用，對亞馬遜影響中性。

neutral.title: Trade Desk CFO Exit Tests Valuation Confidence Under Amazon Competition
neutral.reason: 主要討論 Trade Desk 的高層異動，亞馬遜僅被提及為競爭對手，無直接影響。

neutral.title: AMZN: Amazon Stock Fans Get Big Robotics News — Amazon Acquires Fauna Robotics
neutral.reason: 重複報導收購 Fauna Robotics 的新聞，資訊已在 bullish 類別中涵蓋。

neutral.title: Amazon Gets In Tesla's Turf, Acquires Fauna Robotics
neutral.reason: 重複報導收購 Fauna Robotics 的新聞，資訊已在 bullish 類別中涵蓋。

neutral.title: Update: Market Chatter: Amazon Acquires Fauna Robotics
neutral.reason: 重複報導收購 Fauna Robotics 的新聞，資訊已在 bullish 類別中涵蓋。
